_comment: Immortal Graveyard (仙坟) — 17-layer immortal graveyard in the Vermilion Bird Starfield. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L76): A 17-layer immortal graveyard. Wang Lin glimpses the Fu Clan's Golden Leaf Flame Source Origin on the 17th layer. His Fire Essence potential awakened here. Uses nether noise settings for vertical layered terrain (naturally generates multi-level platforms ideal for 17 layers). Single biome: immortal_graveyard. Sealed — requires specific access method. Prime Directive: the 17 layers are objective — they were constructed by immortals; the Fire Essence potential is a property of this place, not created by observation.
